title: The County Chairman
writer: George Ade, Gladys Lehman, Sam Hellman
actors: Will Rogers, Evelyn Venable, Kent Taylor
plot: Based on George Ade's play which, in part, was based on an incident in a 1902 election in Wyoming, with women's-right-to-vote playing a large role. Here, Jim Hackler, local party-boss in a Wyoming county, has to decide to do what'...
